claims.claim: `ExperienceDeltaBusV1` and related type surfaces are read-only truth channels, not live vector-control authority.
`ExperienceDeltaBusV2DesignPreview` is explicitly default-off, non-persistent, and not runtime authority.
Serde and clamping boundaries should preserve fluid spectral dimension metadata and reject or fallback non-finite values.
Sparse `ResonanceViscosityVectorV1` serialization could surprise downstream dense-vector consumers, so consumers must treat it as an optional typed packet rather than a fixed dense vector.
